subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में कौन सा फ़ोंटल है ?
B_en: Cenotaph of Maharaja Jai Singh II
explanation_en: The Palace of Winds, also known as Hawa Mahal, is a famous palace located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. It was built by Maharaja Pratap Singh in 1799.
